message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the centre
The restaurant should serve north american food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 4 people at 12:45 on saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to peterborough and should arrive by 11:30
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on sunday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
